name: snake-arena-root
description: Multiplayer Snake Arena Game — Monorepo Root

scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix shared && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.build:shared: npm install --prefix shared && npm run build --prefix shared
scripts.build:server: npm run build:server:addon && npm run build:server:ts
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server && npm run build:server:addon && npm run build:server:ts && npm run build:client
scripts.clean: npx rimraf client/dist server/dist server/build shared/dist
